---
title: "Scrollable Foldable Code"
engine: jupyter
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    theme: flatly.scss
filters:
  - pyodide
---

## Simulation Demo



<details>
<summary><strong>Parameters (click to expand)</strong></summary>
<div>  


```{pyodide-python}

import numpy as np


# **********************************************************
# ***    SIMULATION PARAMETERS                           ***
# **********************************************************
n_pops = 100           # Number of populations in the ensemble
m = 20                 # Number of distinct genotypes (individuals) per population
ngens = 5000           # Number of generations to simulate
ti = 2                 # Time increments per generation (for smoother dynamics)
rho = 0.5              # Initial correlation between X and Y loci
mu_X, mu_Y = -0.1, -0.1  # Mean values for loci X and Y
sigma_X, sigma_Y = 0.05, 0.05  # Standard deviations for loci X and Y
cov_XY = rho * sigma_X * sigma_Y  # Covariance between X and Y
cov_matrix = np.array([[sigma_X**2, cov_XY], [cov_XY, sigma_Y**2]])  # Covariance matrix for bivariate distributions
tf = 200               # Final time (in generations) for ensemble plots
tr = tf*ti             # Final time (in time increments) for ensemble plots

def sample_bivariate(dist, size):
    if dist == "multivariate_normal":
        return np.random.multivariate_normal([mu_X, mu_Y], cov_matrix, size=size)
    elif dist == "bivariate_t":
        df = 5
        g = np.random.gamma(df / 2., 2. / df, size=(size,))
        Z = np.random.multivariate_normal([0, 0], cov_matrix, size=size)
        return np.array([mu_X, mu_Y]) + Z / np.sqrt(g)[:, None]
    elif dist == "bivariate_uniform":
        low  = [mu_X - sigma_X * np.sqrt(3), mu_Y - sigma_Y * np.sqrt(3)]
        high = [mu_X + sigma_X * np.sqrt(3), mu_Y + sigma_Y * np.sqrt(3)]
        return np.random.uniform(low, high, size=(size,))
    else:
        raise ValueError("Unknown distribution type")

np.random.seed(42)  # For reproducibility


```



</div>
</details> 
<details>
 <summary><strong>Computation (click to expand)</strong></summary>

```{pyodide-python}

# Add noise
noise = 0.1 * np.random.randn(gens)
y_noisy = y + noise

```

</details> 
<details> <summary><strong>Plotting</strong></summary>

```{pyodide-python}

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 4))
plt.plot(x, y_noisy, label="Noisy sin(x)", color="blue")
plt.plot(x, y, label="True sin(x)", color="red", linestyle="--")
plt.xlabel("x")
plt.ylabel("y")
plt.title("Sine Wave with Noise")
plt.legend()
plt.grid(True)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

```

</details>

::: {.raw-html}
<script>
// Function to setup scroll handlers
function setupScrollHandlers() {
  console.log("Setting up scroll handlers after Pyodide load");
  
  // Find all code blocks and their containers
  const codeBlocks = document.querySelectorAll('div.sourceCode');
  const detailDivs = document.querySelectorAll('details > div');
  
  console.log("Found code blocks:", codeBlocks.length);
  console.log("Found detail divs:", detailDivs.length);
  
  // Handle code blocks
  codeBlocks.forEach(function(block, index) {
    console.log("Setting up block", index, block);
    
    // Add mouse wheel event listener to the div
    block.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
      console.log("Wheel event on div block", index, "deltaY:", e.deltaY);
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      this.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
      return false;
    }, { passive: false, capture: true });
    
    // Also handle the pre element inside
    const preElement = block.querySelector('pre.sourceCode');
    if (preElement) {
      console.log("Found pre element in block", index);
      preElement.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
        console.log("Wheel event on pre element", index, "deltaY:", e.deltaY);
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
        return false;
      }, { passive: false, capture: true });
    }
    
    // Also handle the code element inside
    const codeElement = block.querySelector('code.sourceCode');
    if (codeElement) {
      console.log("Found code element in block", index);
      codeElement.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
        console.log("Wheel event on code element", index, "deltaY:", e.deltaY);
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
        return false;
      }, { passive: false, capture: true });
    }
    
    // Handle horizontal scrolling with shift+wheel
    block.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
      if (e.shiftKey) {
        console.log("Shift+wheel event on block", index, "deltaY:", e.deltaY);
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.scrollLeft += e.deltaY;
        return false;
      }
    }, { passive: false, capture: true });
    
    // Add event listener to the entire block area
    block.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
      console.log("Mouse entered block", index);
    });
    
    block.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
      console.log("Mouse left block", index);
    });
    
    // Touch events for mobile
    let isScrolling = false;
    let startY = 0;
    let startX = 0;
    let startScrollTop = 0;
    let startScrollLeft = 0;
    
    block.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
      isScrolling = true;
      startY = e.touches[0].clientY;
      startX = e.touches[0].clientX;
      startScrollTop = this.scrollTop;
      startScrollLeft = this.scrollLeft;
    });
    
    block.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {
      if (!isScrolling) return;
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      const deltaY = startY - e.touches[0].clientY;
      const deltaX = startX - e.touches[0].clientX;
      this.scrollTop = startScrollTop + deltaY;
      this.scrollLeft = startScrollLeft + deltaX;
    });
    
    block.addEventListener('touchend', function() {
      isScrolling = false;
    });
  });
  
  // Handle detail divs to prevent outer scrolling
  detailDivs.forEach(function(div) {
    div.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
      e.stopPropagation();
    }, { passive: false });
  });
  
             // Global wheel handler as fallback
           document.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
             const target = e.target;
             console.log("Global wheel event, target:", target, "deltaY:", e.deltaY);
             console.log("Target classes:", target.className);
             console.log("Target tag:", target.tagName);
    
    // Monaco Editor specific targeting
    if (target.closest('.monaco-editor')) {
      console.log("Global wheel event on Monaco Editor");
      const monacoEditor = target.closest('.monaco-editor');
      const scrollableElement = monacoEditor.querySelector('.monaco-scrollable-element');
      if (scrollableElement) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        scrollableElement.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
        console.log("Applied scroll to Monaco scrollable element, new scrollTop:", scrollableElement.scrollTop);
        return false;
      }
    }

    // Target Monaco Editor's internal scrollable containers
    if (target.closest('.lines-content') || target.closest('.view-lines')) {
      console.log("Global wheel event on Monaco lines content");
      const monacoContainer = target.closest('.monaco-editor');
      if (monacoContainer) {
        const scrollableElement = monacoContainer.querySelector('.monaco-scrollable-element') || 
                                monacoContainer.querySelector('.overflow-guard') ||
                                monacoContainer.querySelector('[data-uri]');
        if (scrollableElement) {
          e.preventDefault();
          e.stopPropagation();
          scrollableElement.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
          console.log("Applied scroll to Monaco container, new scrollTop:", scrollableElement.scrollTop);
          return false;
        }
      }
    }
    
    // Check for sourceCode elements
    if (target.closest('.sourceCode')) {
      console.log("Global wheel event on sourceCode element");
      const sourceCode = target.closest('.sourceCode');
      if (sourceCode) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        sourceCode.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
        console.log("Applied scroll to sourceCode, new scrollTop:", sourceCode.scrollTop);
        return false;
      }
    }
    
    // Check for Pyodide elements
    if (target.closest('.pyodide-cell') || target.closest('.qpyodide-cell')) {
      console.log("Global wheel event on Pyodide element");
      const pyodideCell = target.closest('.pyodide-cell') || target.closest('.qpyodide-cell');
      if (pyodideCell) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        pyodideCell.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
        console.log("Applied scroll to pyodide cell, new scrollTop:", pyodideCell.scrollTop);
        return false;
      }
    }
    
    // Look for any element with scrollable content
    let scrollableElement = target.closest('[style*="overflow"], [style*="scroll"]');
    if (!scrollableElement) {
      // Try to find Monaco Editor's scrollable element from the target
      const monacoParent = target.closest('.monaco-editor, .jp-CodeCell, .pyodide-cell');
      if (monacoParent) {
        scrollableElement = monacoParent.querySelector('.monaco-scrollable-element, .overflow-guard, [data-uri]');
      }
    }
    
    if (scrollableElement) {
      console.log("Global wheel event on scrollable element:", scrollableElement);
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      scrollableElement.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
      console.log("Applied scroll to scrollable element, new scrollTop:", scrollableElement.scrollTop);
      return false;
    }
    
    // If we get here, log that no scrollable element was found
    console.log("No scrollable element found for wheel event");
  }, { passive: false, capture: true });
}

// Wait for DOM to load, then wait for Pyodide to finish
         document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
           console.log("Main document script loaded");
           
           // Test if wheel events are being captured at all
           document.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
             console.log("Document wheel event captured, deltaY:", e.deltaY);
           }, { passive: false, capture: true });
           
           // Test wheel events on the body
           document.body.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
             console.log("Body wheel event captured, deltaY:", e.deltaY, "target:", e.target);
           }, { passive: false, capture: true });
           
           // Add an even earlier wheel event listener to catch events before Monaco Editor
           console.log("Setting up window wheel event listener");
           window.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
             console.log("Window wheel event captured, deltaY:", e.deltaY, "target:", e.target);
             
             // Get mouse position to determine which code block we're over
             const mouseX = e.clientX;
             const mouseY = e.clientY;
             
             console.log("Mouse position:", mouseX, mouseY);
             
             // Find all code blocks and check if mouse is over any of them
             const codeBlocks = document.querySelectorAll('.sourceCode, .monaco-editor, .pyodide-cell, .jp-CodeCell');
             let foundCodeBlock = null;
             
             console.log("Checking", codeBlocks.length, "code blocks for mouse position");
             
             codeBlocks.forEach(function(block, index) {
               const rect = block.getBoundingClientRect();
               console.log("Block", index, "rect:", rect.left, rect.top, rect.right, rect.bottom);
               
               if (mouseX >= rect.left && mouseX <= rect.right && 
                   mouseY >= rect.top && mouseY <= rect.bottom) {
                 foundCodeBlock = block;
                 console.log("Mouse is over code block:", block, "class:", block.className);
               }
             });
             
             if (foundCodeBlock) {
               console.log("Window wheel event over code block, preventing default");
               e.preventDefault();
               e.stopPropagation();
               
               // Try to find the actual scrollable element within the code block
               let scrollableElement = foundCodeBlock;
               
               // For Monaco Editor, look for its internal scrollable elements
               if (foundCodeBlock.classList.contains('monaco-editor')) {
                 const monacoScrollable = foundCodeBlock.querySelector('.monaco-scrollable-element') ||
                                        foundCodeBlock.querySelector('.overflow-guard') ||
                                        foundCodeBlock.querySelector('[data-uri]');
                 if (monacoScrollable) {
                   scrollableElement = monacoScrollable;
                   console.log("Found Monaco scrollable element:", monacoScrollable);
                 }
               }
               
               // Apply the scroll
               const oldScrollTop = scrollableElement.scrollTop;
               scrollableElement.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
               console.log("Applied scroll via window handler, old scrollTop:", oldScrollTop, "new scrollTop:", scrollableElement.scrollTop);
               return false;
             } else {
               console.log("Mouse not over any code block");
             }
           }, { passive: false, capture: true });
           
           // Also try a document-level listener as a backup
           console.log("Setting up document wheel event listener");
           document.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
             console.log("Document wheel event captured, deltaY:", e.deltaY, "target:", e.target);
             
             // Get mouse position to determine which code block we're over
             const mouseX = e.clientX;
             const mouseY = e.clientY;
             
             console.log("Document - Mouse position:", mouseX, mouseY);
             
             // Find all code blocks and check if mouse is over any of them
             const codeBlocks = document.querySelectorAll('.sourceCode, .monaco-editor, .pyodide-cell, .jp-CodeCell');
             let foundCodeBlock = null;
             
             console.log("Document - Checking", codeBlocks.length, "code blocks for mouse position");
             
             codeBlocks.forEach(function(block, index) {
               const rect = block.getBoundingClientRect();
               console.log("Document - Block", index, "rect:", rect.left, rect.top, rect.right, rect.bottom);
               
               if (mouseX >= rect.left && mouseX <= rect.right && 
                   mouseY >= rect.top && mouseY <= rect.bottom) {
                 foundCodeBlock = block;
                 console.log("Document - Mouse is over code block:", block, "class:", block.className);
               }
             });
             
             if (foundCodeBlock) {
               console.log("Document wheel event over code block, preventing default");
               e.preventDefault();
               e.stopPropagation();
               
               // Try to find the actual scrollable element within the code block
               let scrollableElement = foundCodeBlock;
               
               // For Monaco Editor, look for its internal scrollable elements
               if (foundCodeBlock.classList.contains('monaco-editor')) {
                 const monacoScrollable = foundCodeBlock.querySelector('.monaco-scrollable-element') ||
                                        foundCodeBlock.querySelector('.overflow-guard') ||
                                        foundCodeBlock.querySelector('[data-uri]');
                 if (monacoScrollable) {
                   scrollableElement = monacoScrollable;
                   console.log("Document - Found Monaco scrollable element:", monacoScrollable);
                 }
               }
               
               // Apply the scroll
               const oldScrollTop = scrollableElement.scrollTop;
               scrollableElement.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
               console.log("Document - Applied scroll, old scrollTop:", oldScrollTop, "new scrollTop:", scrollableElement.scrollTop);
               return false;
             } else {
               console.log("Document - Mouse not over any code block");
             }
           }, { passive: false, capture: true });
           
           // Try to override Monaco Editor's wheel event handling
           setTimeout(function() {
             console.log("Attempting to override Monaco Editor wheel events");
             const monacoEditors = document.querySelectorAll('.monaco-editor');
             console.log("Found Monaco Editors:", monacoEditors.length);
             
             monacoEditors.forEach(function(editor, index) {
               console.log("Found Monaco Editor", index, editor);
               
               // Try to disable Monaco Editor's wheel event handling
               if (editor.style) {
                 editor.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
               }
               
               // Add our own wheel event listener directly to the Monaco Editor
               editor.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
                 console.log("Monaco Editor wheel event captured, deltaY:", e.deltaY);
                 e.preventDefault();
                 e.stopPropagation();
                 
                 const scrollableElement = editor.querySelector('.monaco-scrollable-element') || 
                                         editor.querySelector('.overflow-guard') ||
                                         editor.querySelector('[data-uri]');
                 if (scrollableElement) {
                   scrollableElement.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
                   console.log("Applied scroll to Monaco scrollable element, new scrollTop:", scrollableElement.scrollTop);
                 } else {
                   // Fallback: try to scroll the editor itself
                   editor.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
                   console.log("Applied scroll to Monaco editor itself, new scrollTop:", editor.scrollTop);
                 }
                 return false;
               }, { passive: false, capture: true });
             });
           }, 5000); // Wait 5 seconds for Monaco Editor to fully initialize
  
  // Check if Pyodide is already loaded
  if (window.pyodide) {
    console.log("Pyodide already loaded, setting up handlers immediately");
    setupScrollHandlers();
  } else {
    // Wait for Pyodide to finish loading
    console.log("Waiting for Pyodide to load...");
    
    // Check every 100ms for Pyodide completion
    const checkPyodide = setInterval(function() {
      if (window.pyodide) {
        console.log("Pyodide detected, setting up handlers");
        clearInterval(checkPyodide);
        setupScrollHandlers();
      }
    }, 100);
    
    // Also listen for the completion message
    window.addEventListener('message', function(event) {
      if (event.data && event.data.type === 'pyodide-loaded') {
        console.log("Pyodide loaded message received, setting up handlers");
        clearInterval(checkPyodide);
        setupScrollHandlers();
      }
    });
    
    // Fallback: setup handlers after 3 seconds regardless
    setTimeout(function() {
      console.log("Fallback: setting up handlers after timeout");
      clearInterval(checkPyodide);
      setupScrollHandlers();
      
      // Also try to setup handlers on any new elements that might be created
      const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
        mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
          if (mutation.type === 'childList') {
            mutation.addedNodes.forEach(function(node) {
              if (node.nodeType === 1 && (node.classList.contains('sourceCode') || node.querySelector('.sourceCode'))) {
                console.log("New sourceCode element detected, setting up handlers");
                setupScrollHandlers();
              }
            });
          }
        });
      });
      
      observer.observe(document.body, {
        childList: true,
        subtree: true
      });
    }, 3000);
  }
});
</script>
:::
